DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, DEC-8-2021 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. THE TRIAL OF THE ACTION WAS CONTINUED BY THE PRESIDING JUDGE TO APRIL 18, 2022 WITH DISCOVERY REMAINING OPEN. THE COURT REVIEWED THE PROCESS TO BE FOLLOWED FOR COMPLETION OF THE MEET AND CONFER PROCESS AND SUBMISSION OF A SUPPLEMENTAL SEPARATE STATEMENT TO FACILITATE RULINGS ON OBJECTIONS, IF NECESSARY. MOTION CONTINUED AND SPECIALLY SET TO JANUARY 14, 2022 AT 1:30 PM. COURT TO SEND A ZOOM INVITATION. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN (302/JPT)
